{{CargoClone
|name=Banshee Trish
|rank=red
|cabin=1
|id=1004
|gene1={race} HARD +50
|gene2={race} AFFCT +50
|gene3=For Round 1, All ELMT DMG +2.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Minions in battle:
> Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Mutant Gene Research SPD +0.6%
|gene6=Per 60 Minions in battle:
> Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Mutant Gene Research SPD +1%
|}}
